_comment: Per-field example overrides applied AFTER reading OpenAPI examples. Use when the spec ships a stale or invalid example value. `_global` applies to every operation that has a field of that name; an op-specific block beats `_global`.

_notes.timezone: Spec descriptions say decimal hours OR IANA, examples show '-5', but the live SaaS validator rejects numeric offsets with `Timezone string must be an IANA identifier`. UTC is universally accepted and equivalent to 0 for any test render.
